title: Sentinel Shield release candidate descriptor
description: A read-only descriptor produced by `authorize-production-release.sh prepare` and re-verified by `verify-candidate`. It names the exact release identity (version/stage/scope/source_commit/tag) and POINTS AT the independent evidence artifacts that back each production-GA gate. The descriptor NEVER contains the gate verdicts as trusted booleans — verify-candidate re-derives every verdict from the referenced artifacts and FAILS CLOSED when any is missing, malformed, or not green. Relative artifact/doc paths are resolved against --base-dir (default: the descriptor's own directory). Contains NO secrets.

schema_version.description: Only "1" is supported; consumers fail closed otherwise.

release_scope.description: Governance track. Only 'engine-only' is authorizable to GA by this tool; framework-validated/full-platform GA remains BLOCKED.

source_commit.description: The exact default-branch source commit whose CI proves this candidate. Must equal the evidence engine_commit.

default_branch.description: Default branch the source_commit must belong to (default 'master'). Informational; the CI-event check rejects pull_request-only evidence.

artifacts.description: Paths to the independent evidence artifacts re-verified by verify-candidate. Required members must be present for a GA candidate; RC additionally may omit adopter/compat where policy permits (verify-candidate enforces per-stage requirements).

docs.description: Published-limitations and support/incident-response readiness documents. verify-candidate requires each named file to exist and be non-empty.
